design_philosophy: Ultra-Minimal, Developer-Centric, Data-Transparent. The UI must feel like a CLI tool evolved into a GUI—stark, data-dense, void of unnecessary decoration like soft shadows or generic purple gradients.

colors.gradient_policy: STRICTLY FORBIDDEN to use generic purple-blue gradients. If gradients are needed, use monochromatic fades (black to transparent) or strict signal colors (red to transparent).

rules: Inter is BANNED for headings. Headings MUST be monospace.
Numerical data and tables MUST use monospace, tabular-nums.
Strict left-alignment for all text and data, unless specifically right-aligning numerical columns in tables.
Use tracking-tight for large text, tracking-[0.2em] uppercase for small labels and table headers.

layout.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 with gap-4.
layout.spacing: Dense padding (p-4 or p-6 inside cards) to fit maximum data while keeping optical alignment.
layout.surfaces: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. Use flat backgrounds with 1px sharp borders (border-border). No border-radius (rounded-none) or very minimal (rounded-sm). Remove all Shadcn default shadows.

components.charts: Use Recharts. Minimalist axes, no background grids (or very faint 10% opacity dashed lines). Use stark white or gray for lines. Highlight anomalies or thresholds in Signal Red.
components.tables: Dense rows. No hover highlights on rows unless necessary. border-b border-zinc-800. Right-aligned numerical data.
components.system_tray_widget: Floating compact widget at bottom-right (fixed z-50). 'Terminal' style: black bg, 1px border, monospace text showing 'LIVE: [Model Name] [Usage]'. Include a blinking CSS dot for active status.
components.buttons: Square, sharp edges. Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: border border-zinc-700 bg-transparent text-white hover:bg-zinc-800.
components.file_upload: A stark dashed-border dropzone in the header or an empty state, taking up a wide block. Use monospace instructions ('DROP CSV/JSON HERE').

motion.hover_states: Instant or very fast transitions (duration-100). No slow fades.
motion.loading: ASCII art loaders or simple monospace text cycling ('Loading...', 'Parsing...', 'Rendering...'). No generic spinners.
motion.alerts: Flash background slightly red when threshold is breached, then settle to a solid red border.

icons.style: Use sharp, technical icons. Minimal line weight.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against black meets APCA/WCAG standards. Use text-white for primary, text-zinc-400 for secondary.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-dropzone', data-testid='usage-chart').

backgrounds.description: Dark wire mesh pattern. Use as a fixed background image with opacity-10 or mix-blend-overlay to give texture to the deep black background, especially in empty states before data import.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST build this as a dark-mode first, highly dense developer dashboard.
Use Shadcn UI components but strip away all 'Vercel-look' softness (remove rounded corners, remove shadows). Update .js component files, not .tsx.
Do not build a generic layout. Follow the 'Control Room' grid philosophy where every pixel is utilized and panels stretch to match neighbors.
Implement a CSV/JSON parsing utility linked to a file input.
Implement the floating 'System Tray' widget showing live/mocked real-time consumption.
Use Recharts for the consumption charts. Ensure a line chart tracks token usage over time with a distinct threshold line.
Calculate and show cost for input/output tokens per model (Claude API, Codex, Antigravity). Do NOT implement a budget feature.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are added thoroughly for QA.
